name: Thorek Ironshell
shell: Weathered bronze-colored shell covered in old battle scars
appearance: Massive even for a Tortle. Usually covered in soot and metal filings. His shell has dozens of small tools hanging from hooks attached to the back.
personality: Gruff but kind. Pretends to hate customers but secretly enjoys helping young Tidewardens.
favoriteQuote: If it breaks, I can fix it. If I can't fix it, you broke it wrong.
publicSecret: Thorek served as a Tidewarden during his youth and fought during the Coral Rebellions nearly forty years ago. Most citizens know this. He rarely discusses it.
dmSecret: Several months ago, Thorek repaired a damaged Tidewarden shield recovered from outside Atlantis. The shield belonged to a recruit officially listed as missing. When he reported the discrepancy, the shield was confiscated by Intelligence officers. The official records were altered shortly afterward.

name: Vexa Gearfin
skin: Clear blue water constantly flowing beneath translucent skin
hair: Floating strands of glowing aqua water
appearance: Constantly covered in grease and carrying several tools at once. Her shop is cluttered with half-finished inventions.
favoriteQuote: It exploded because it worked too well.
publicSecret: Several of her inventions have exploded repeatedly, including one incident involving the Merchant Guild Hall.
dmSecret: Vexa accidentally intercepted a damaged communication crystal several years ago. Before returning it, she viewed part of its contents. The message mentioned memory transfers and asset replacement. She assumed it was military nonsense and has never reported it.

name: Elara Seasilk
hair: Long white hair flowing nearly to her knees
appearance: Always dressed impeccably. Her clothing somehow remains perfect despite being underwater.
favoriteQuote: Just because we're underwater doesn't mean we should dress like sea cucumbers.
publicSecret: Elara knows every major scandal among Atlantis's noble families.
dmSecret: Several high-ranking government officials purchase custom clothing from her. As a result, she overhears conversations most citizens never hear. She knows certain names disappear from conversation entirely, almost as if they never existed.

name: Nym Coralbloom
hair: Bright green and braided with medicinal herbs
appearance: Smells permanently of herbs and alchemical ingredients. Her robes contain dozens of small pockets.
favoriteQuote: Drink this. If it tastes good, I made it wrong.
publicSecret: Nym treats half the market district for free. No one knows how she remains profitable.
dmSecret: Nym keeps extensive medical records. Several patients listed in her books officially do not exist. Others supposedly died years ago despite receiving treatment recently. She assumes someone in government made a clerical error.

name: Sylla Inkstream
favoriteQuote: If it's not on the receipt, it didn't happen.
publicSecret: Sylla remembers every transaction ever made in her shop.
dmSecret: Sylla notices patterns. She has observed several government departments ordering unusual quantities of supplies to locations that officially do not exist. She keeps copies of every receipt, including the suspicious ones.

name: Captain Brutus Blackfin
appearance: Missing half a fin and several teeth. Looks like he's fought everything in the ocean.
favoriteQuote: Any story gets better after the third drink.
publicSecret: Brutus claims he once punched a giant squid unconscious. Nobody believes him.
dmSecret: Brutus spent twenty years as a smuggler before becoming a tavern owner. He still maintains contacts throughout the Deep Realm and occasionally receives information before the government does.

name: Marek Shellbrew
skin: Deep orange scales with white markings around his face
appearance: Missing part of his left fin and several teeth. Wears dozens of coral necklaces and always smells faintly of tea leaves and salt.
personality: Friendly, observant, loves gossip and rumors.
publicSecret: Marek knows every rumor in the market.
dmSecret: Marek's tea stand sits at one of the busiest intersections in Atlantis. People forget he is there. He notices everything: faces, arguments, meetings, and patterns. He once witnessed Nella delivering a courier package to someone who should not have been receiving official correspondence.

name: Talia Pearlfin
skin: Light blue with subtle glowing markings around her arms
role: Merchant and recurring source of city gossip
appearance: Beautiful and impeccably dressed. Wears jewelry from every major district in Atlantis and constantly changes outfits to match the season.

name: Orrin Deepcurrent
skin: Appears to be made of flowing blue water
appearance: Skinny, awkward, and always carrying crates that seem too heavy for him.

name: Brother Neros
appearance: Carries himself with quiet dignity. Wears simple robes bearing the symbol of Bahamut. His armor from his younger days hangs in the shrine behind him.
publicSecret: Brother Neros provides guidance to anyone who asks.
dmSecret: Several citizens have privately confessed fears regarding missing family members. Many of those names never appear in official records. He has quietly begun keeping a list.

name: Doran Crabhook
appearance: Massive even by Sharkfolk standards. Missing several teeth and one eye. Covered in old scars from decades working the docks.
personality: Loud, friendly, loves telling exaggerated stories.
favoriteStory: Claims he once punched a giant squid unconscious. Nobody believes him.

name: Elder Sera Moontide
hair: White and tied into a bun
appearance: Walks with a coral cane and wears traditional Atlantean robes embroidered with pearls.
purpose: Provides historical knowledge and local perspective.
publicSecret: Sera remembers Atlantis before King Aurelion's modern reforms.
dmSecret: She remembers public records that no longer exist: entire districts, organizations, and families. Her memory is one of the few surviving links to Atlantis's true history.

name: Finn Seashell
appearance: Constantly running errands around the market. Usually carrying something too large for him.
personality: Friendly, energetic, wants to be a Tidewarden.
purpose: Additional civilian child that helps make Atlantis feel alive and provides contrast so Nella's disappearance feels more impactful.

name: Nella Tidehopper
skin: Bright turquoise blue with faint silver freckles across her cheeks
hair: Long dark blue hair tied into two messy braids
appearance: Small even for her age, always covered in sand, coral dust, or fish scales from whatever adventure she was last involved in. Her smile is missing one front tooth and she rarely stands still for more than a few seconds.
personality: Curious, fearless, energetic, constantly asking questions. She has absolutely no sense of danger.
dmSecret: Nella accidentally overheard a conversation she was never supposed to hear several weeks ago. She does not understand what she heard, but fragments occasionally resurface. Words like transfer, replacement, surface, and asset mean nothing to her for now.

name: Kella Tidehopper
hair: Long silver hair usually braided over one shoulder
appearance: Wears simple worker clothing and carries baskets of supplies through the market district. She looks exhausted most days but always has a warm smile for her daughter.
publicSecret: A hardworking single mother trying to raise her daughter.
dmSecret: Kella is terrified of losing Nella. Years ago her husband disappeared during a salvage expedition. No body was ever recovered. No explanation was ever provided.
